mnemonics: CRAN is a CAN of R software packages you can download
keyPoints: R is an open-source programming language for statistical computing and graphics
RStudio is the most popular Integrated Development Environment (IDE) for R
Basic objects in R include vectors, matrices, data frames, and lists
commonMistakes: Using = instead of <- for assignment (though both work, <- is conventional)
Forgetting that R is case-sensitive (e.g., Data is not the same as data)
Attempting to use functions without first loading required packages
